levels.name: China Metro Arcade
levels.scenario: Rainy China arcade frontage with neon shop signs, vending machines, reflective pavement, and a clear first fight lane.
levels.artTarget: Dense cyberpunk China arcade street with strong neon reflections, readable floor line, and no visible prototype tile repetition.
levels.scenePlatePrompt: Long high-detail 16-bit China cyberpunk arcade street, rainy night, neon signs, arcade facade, reflective pavement, readable beat-em-up lane.
levels.gameplayHook: Intro spacing stage that teaches movement, short combos, guarding, and boss trigger distance.
levels.bossMechanic: Balanced intro boss with readable blade pressure and simple punish windows.
levels.nextHarnessStep: Tune boss-specific behavior and capture responsive review shots after playtesting.

levels.name: China Station
levels.scenario: Neon subway entrance and station wall with twin stairways, vending machines, wet concrete, and a compact ambush space.
levels.artTarget: Finished China metro station plate with readable stairs as background only, clear combat floor, and strong magenta/cyan light pools.
levels.scenePlatePrompt: Long high-detail 16-bit China cyberpunk subway station exterior, twin stair entrances, vending machines, rainy reflections, readable beat-em-up lane.
levels.gameplayHook: Stairwell ambush waves enter from both sides while the player controls the central lane.
levels.bossMechanic: Fast station boss who pressures lanes like a turnstile ambush.
levels.nextHarnessStep: Tune boss-specific behavior and capture responsive review shots after playtesting.

levels.name: China Back Alley
levels.scenario: Narrow China service alley with repair bays, shuttered shops, stacked crates, and wet neon reflections.
levels.artTarget: Moody alley depth with a central vanishing point, readable foreground lane, and dense production detail without blocking actors.
levels.scenePlatePrompt: Long high-detail 16-bit China cyberpunk back alley, repair garages, crates, neon signs, rainy pavement, readable beat-em-up lane.
levels.gameplayHook: Tighter lane pressure with enemies using shop-door entrances and crate cover.
levels.bossMechanic: Heavy alley boss who controls space with slow but punishing kicks.
levels.nextHarnessStep: Tune boss-specific behavior and capture responsive review shots after playtesting.

levels.name: China Night Market
levels.scenario: Late-night China food and shop street with restaurant counters, lantern warmth, pharmacy lights, and wet open fight space.
levels.artTarget: Warm/cool neon market plate with plenty of floor readability and no fake repeated wall pattern.
levels.scenePlatePrompt: Long high-detail 16-bit China night market street, food counters, neon shop signs, rain reflections, open beat-em-up combat lane.
levels.gameplayHook: Market waves use staggered side entrances and rolling cart hazards after prop tooling exists.
levels.bossMechanic: Final China boss with fast pressure after a denser market swarm.
levels.nextHarnessStep: Tune boss-specific behavior and capture responsive review shots after playtesting.

levels.name: Solar Foundry
levels.scenario: Glowing factory floor with solar furnaces, conveyor belts, molten light, and industrial catwalk silhouettes.
levels.artTarget: Hot orange/cyan factory contrast, layered machinery, moving conveyor props, safe readable foreground.
levels.scenePlatePrompt: SNES pixel-art solar foundry, glowing furnaces, conveyor belts, catwalks, molten reflections, industrial machines, readable beat-em-up floor.
levels.gameplayHook: Conveyor lane drift and timed heat vents that enemies also respect.
levels.bossMechanic: Armored boss using heat vent zones and hammer slam tells.
levels.nextHarnessStep: Playable in harness with prototype stand-in art. Replace scene plate, boss sheet, and stage-specific mechanics before production approval.

levels.name: Skybridge District
levels.scenario: Glass bridges between towers, hologram ads, wind, and drones crossing behind the fight.
levels.artTarget: High-altitude depth, transparent bridge surfaces, distant traffic, and bright ad glow without losing silhouettes.
levels.scenePlatePrompt: Pixel-art futuristic skybridge, glass floor, tower city depth, holographic signs, drones, high wind, night lights, readable combat lane.
levels.gameplayHook: Drone projectiles and wind-lane nudges with clear warning effects.
levels.bossMechanic: Controller boss that commands drones and exposes weak windows after overcommit.
levels.nextHarnessStep: Playable in harness with prototype stand-in art. Replace scene plate, boss sheet, and stage-specific mechanics before production approval.

levels.name: Data Garden
levels.scenario: Holographic botanical installation with glowing trees, data streams, and security avatars.
levels.artTarget: Organic neon shapes, transparent hologram layers, calm-but-strange color palette.
levels.scenePlatePrompt: SNES-style holographic data garden, glowing digital trees, floating particles, glass floor, security avatars, cyber botanical scene, readable beat-em-up lane.
levels.gameplayHook: Illusion decoys and predictable teleport pads that never break visual believability.
levels.bossMechanic: Decoy boss with clear tells distinguishing real body from projection.
levels.nextHarnessStep: Playable in harness with prototype stand-in art. Replace scene plate, boss sheet, and stage-specific mechanics before production approval.

levels.name: Harbor Storm
levels.scenario: Container harbor in a storm with cranes, puddles, warning beacons, and waves beyond the dock.
levels.artTarget: Storm lighting, container depth, water motion, crane silhouettes, readable dock floor.
levels.scenePlatePrompt: 16-bit stormy cyberpunk harbor, shipping containers, cranes, wet dock, warning beacons, ocean waves, rain, readable beat-em-up lane.
levels.gameplayHook: Lightning flashes reveal incoming attackers and crane hooks create temporary lane blockers.
levels.bossMechanic: Long-range chain boss who pulls props and punishes bad spacing.
levels.nextHarnessStep: Playable in harness with prototype stand-in art. Replace scene plate, boss sheet, and stage-specific mechanics before production approval.

levels.name: Broadcast Tower
levels.scenario: Tower interior and rooftop transmitter rooms with antennas, signal panels, elevators, and city lights below.
levels.artTarget: Vertical tower drama, broadcast equipment, animated signal pulses, final-ascent mood.
levels.scenePlatePrompt: SNES pixel-art broadcast tower, antenna room, signal panels, elevator doors, city lights below, electronic glow, readable combat lane.
levels.gameplayHook: Signal pulse waves interrupt careless attacks but are clearly telegraphed.
levels.bossMechanic: Technical boss using signal pulses, delayed mines, and punishable channeling.
levels.nextHarnessStep: Playable in harness with prototype stand-in art. Replace scene plate, boss sheet, and stage-specific mechanics before production approval.

levels.name: Neon Core
levels.scenario: Final power core chamber under the city, surrounded by reactors, cables, holographic displays, and storm energy.
levels.artTarget: Final-stage spectacle with layered machinery, reactor glow, dramatic foreground silhouettes, and boss-arena clarity.
levels.scenePlatePrompt: 16-bit final cyberpunk reactor core arena, glowing neon energy, cables, machinery, holographic displays, dramatic shadows, readable boss fight floor.
levels.gameplayHook: Multi-phase arena locks with reactor surge patterns and changing safe lanes.
levels.bossMechanic: Three-phase final boss with readable surges, summons, and clear vulnerable windows.
levels.nextHarnessStep: Playable in harness with prototype stand-in art. Replace scene plate, boss sheet, and stage-specific mechanics before production approval.
